'''Tovir Daglear''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]]. He had a [[Security droid/Legends|security droid]] named [[Ganth]] who accompanied him to the [[Spira Regatta Open]] [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] race, along with [[Aneash Maglea]]'s private reception prior to the start of the regatta.
